$comment: Code-graph index for SecureAI, read first per CLAUDE.md 'Graphify First'. Phase 1 captures the proven scanner/ worker+shared modules being ported into secureai/src/, plus the secureai/src modules built so far. Update this as secureai/src grows. Location is referenced by config (graphPath in wrangler vars), never hardcoded in source.

modules.purpose: Typed error hierarchy rooted at ScannerError.
modules.notes: Constructor sets this.name = new.target.name so subclass name survives transpilation.

modules.purpose: Single source of truth for cross-boundary TYPES.
modules.notes: Pure types, zero runtime. ProofStep.payload is float-free (string|number|boolean). ReputationReport.score is a string.

modules.purpose: Zod schemas for inbound bodies + external responses (parse at the edge).
modules.notes: A parse failure becomes a structured error/BLOCK, never an unhandled throw.
ALLOW=0 < HUMAN_APPROVAL_REQUIRED=1 < BLOCK=2; escalate keeps baseline on ties.

modules.purpose: Typed Env (bindings) + loadConfig: validates SCANNER_* vars, fail-closed.
modules.notes: No openai/exa fields. aiModel + thresholds + hop caps from SCANNER_* vars with defaults. Cross-field invariants enforced.

modules.purpose: SHA-256 chain primitives + canonical JSON + ProofBuilder.
modules.notes: Port of scanner shared/{hash,canonical,proof}. computeLinkHash = sha256(utf8(prevHash) ++ payload). canonicalPayload hashes only {index,kind,payload}.
Returns { ok, firstBrokenIndex }; starts from proof.genesisHash.

modules.purpose: POST /api/verify: pure recompute of a submitted proof chain (zero subrequests).
modules.notes: genesisHash mismatch vs config.genesisSeed -> CHAIN_BROKEN at index 0 (fail-closed against forged genesis).

modules.purpose: Worker entry; routes /api/verify, fail-closed config load.
modules.notes: loadConfig per API request, fail-closed (bad config -> 500, never enters handler). POST-only; unknown /api/* -> 404.

plannedModules: src/pipeline/redirects.ts (port redirect.ts + ssrf.ts, SSRF guard every hop)
src/pipeline/indicators.ts (NEW: Spamhaus DROP + D1/KV cache, replaces exa.ts)
src/pipeline/inference.ts (NEW: Workers AI injection detection via env.AI, replaces judge.ts)
